title: Call of the Void
description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] random card into your [gold]Hand[/gold] and apply [gold]Ethereal[/gold] to it.
smart_description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random {Amount:plural:card|cards} into your [gold]Hand[/gold] and apply [gold]Ethereal[/gold] to {Amount:plural:it|them}.
